_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Provide advice and input for Disaster Recovery, Contingency, and Continuity of Operations Plans.
reference_document_element_description: Manage data pipeline operations, including monitoring execution schedules, investigating failures, coordinating remediation, verifying recovery, and documenting root cause analysis for recurring issues.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-A-002 (DA, cosine: 0.455), OP-S-005 (OP, cosine: 0.451).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.494). Shared vocabulary: [operations, recovery]. DCWF-only terms [advice, contingency, continuity, disaster, input, plans] vs WIDAI-only terms [analysis, cause, coordinating, data, documenting, execution] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.859 (P=0.866, R=0.853). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Provide advice and input for Disaster Recovery, Contingency, and Continuity of O" and "Manage data pipeline operations, including monitoring execution schedules, inves" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.455 ≈ STS 0.494 (gap 0.040). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [operations, recovery] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.3%. Shared tokens: [operations, recovery]. DCWF-only: [advice, contingency, continuity, disaster, input, plans]. WIDAI-only: [analysis, cause, coordinating, data, documenting, execution].
